source: TPL 10-K FY2025 Item 1 Business; nav_overlay illustrative comps
notes: Surface and NRA inventory from filing acreage. Fair values use nav_overlay assumptions (surface $2,500/ac; NRA at Mar 2025 acquisition comp, probability-weighted for undeveloped). in_base_irr stays false — register does not inflate Lawrence IRR.

properties.name: Permian Basin surface acreage (~882k acres)
properties.valuation_basis: Base 882k × $2,500/ac [Assumption]; high uses May 2025 sale comp $5,718/ac on 787 acres; GAAP assigned land is zero

properties.name: Undeveloped / incremental net royalty acres (~224k NRA)
properties.valuation_basis: 224k NRA × $19,775 Mar 2025 acquisition comp; base applies 25% probability for incremental drilling not in FY2025 run-rate
flags: Do not double-count with producing royalty DCF
